name: email-archive
description: Archive an email by removing it from the inbox. Use for observation-mode emails that need no action — receipts, newsletters, automated notifications. Silently moves the message out of INBOX without notifying the CEO.

inputs.message_id: string — Nylas message ID of the email to archive
inputs.account: string (optional) — named account to archive from (e.g. 'curia', 'joseph'). Defaults to the primary account if omitted.

outputs.archived: boolean — true when the message was successfully archived
